## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content progress, reporting, and upcoming priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Product Launch:** The launch is live, with early press and users arriving. Major coverage (TechCrunch, GeekWire) is anticipated.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [**FAQ Schema:** Jason will research adding FAQ schema to Webflow templates to automate a valuable SEO step.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [**Reporting Deep Dive:** Next week's meeting is a deep dive. Jason will invite Michael to discuss connecting GA (site) and Mixpanel (product) data for a full-funnel view.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [**Holiday Plan:** Production will be front-loaded to create a content runway, allowing both teams to take a light schedule between Christmas and New Year's.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

## Topics

### Product Launch & Content Pipeline

  - [**Launch Status:** Live, with early press and users arriving.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [**Anticipated Coverage:** Major articles from TechCrunch and GeekWire are expected.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [5 articles queued for publication this week.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [3 articles sent for Jason's review.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [5 more articles arriving tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

### Automating FAQ Schema

  - [**Goal:** Automate FAQ schema generation in Webflow to improve SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [**Current Process:** FAQs are added manually after content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Implement schema at the template level to apply automatically to new posts.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [**Implementation Details:**](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
      - [**Retroactive Application:** Likely requires manual updates for existing posts.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [**Dev Support:** Growth X can provide dev support if needed; Bailey will ask for Webflow examples from other clients.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### Reporting & Analytics Strategy

  - [**Next Week's Meeting:** A deep dive on reporting, with Growth X managing directors (e.g., Jacob) attending.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [**Key Focus:** Connecting site (GA) and product (Mixpanel) analytics for a full-funnel view.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [**Goal:** Track user journeys from site entry → signup → product engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [**Current State:** GA conversion events are undefined; Jason will investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**Recent Performance Signals:**](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
      - [**Positive:** Brand citations up, top ranks up 9-10%, engagement up, new posts indexing and climbing.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
      - [**Watch:** Organic clicks softened while impressions held steady. This is a minor flag, not a major concern yet.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Holiday Schedule Alignment

  - [**Goal:** Align schedules to ensure uninterrupted content production during the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [**Plan:** Front-load production before Christmas to create a content runway.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [**Schedule:** Both teams will have a light schedule between Christmas and New Year's.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Pausing weekly syncs for 1-2 weeks is acceptable; Growth X will send async updates.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
      - [Research adding FAQ schema to Webflow templates.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
      - [Investigate current GA conversion event setup.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Invite Michael to next week's reporting deep dive.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
      - [Request Webflow FAQ schema examples from other Growth X clients.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
      - [Flag the GA/Mixpanel integration goal for Jacob and the reporting team.](https://fathom.video/share/hFznRzAVsp1zCZpRiuFYN356RwmucrTs?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
